title: Robustly Citrusy Ukrainian White Beans Stew
description: A hearty and citrusy Ukrainian stew made with dried white beans, perfect for meal prep. This Whole30-friendly dish is juicy and flavorful.

ingredients.name: dried white beans
ingredients.notes: such as navy or cannellini beans

instructions: Rinse the dried white beans and soak them in water for at least 8 hours or overnight.
Drain and rinse the soaked beans, then transfer them to a large pot.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, peeled and chopped carrots, and chopped celery to the pot.
Pour in enough water to cover the ingredients and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 45 minutes, or until the beans are tender.
Stir in the lemon juice, olive oil, sea salt, and black pepper.
Continue to simmer for another 10 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
